intentSynonyms: fetch a single breadcrumbs in tripadvisor
view one specific breadcrumbs in tripadvisor
description: Get the location hierarchy (breadcrumbs) for any TripAdvisor page. Returns the trail from country → state → city → location. Useful for discovering parent geo URLs for listing pages.

url.description: Any TripAdvisor page URL path (restaurant, hotel, attraction, or city)
